meaning: adj.很可能的,合适的,可靠的,有希望的adv.或许,很可能
examples: We will likely see him later.
We will most likely see him later.
Tickets are likely to be expensive.
They're likely to be less mechanised, and to produce goods that command higher prices.
Such a rule is not likely to improve private investment decision-making or promote more efficient markets.
